title: Psylliostachys sisymbriifolius

It belongs to the genus Psylliostachys and is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and surrounding areas. The species is further categorized into the kingdom Plantae, and its classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Family: Apiaceae, Genus: Psylliostachys, Species: P. sisymbriifolius.
